mapper.select: select id, parent_id, type, name, code, path, icon, sort, visible, status, version from sys_menu order by sort asc, id asc
select id, parent_id, type, name, code, path, icon, sort, visible, status, version from sys_menu where id = #{id}
select id, parent_id, type, name, code, path, icon, sort, visible, status, version from sys_menu where code = #{code}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu (parent_id, type, name, code, path, icon, sort, visible, status, version) values (#{parentId}, #{type}, #{name}, #{code}, #{path}, #{icon}, #{sort}, #{visible}, #{status}, #{version})
mapper.update: update sys_menu set parent_id = #{parentId}, type = #{type}, name = #{name}, code = #{code}, path = #{path}, icon = #{icon}, sort = #{sort}, visible = #{visible}, status = #{status}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_menu where parent_id = #{id}
select count(1) from sys_role_menu where menu_id = #{id}
mapper.update: update sys_menu set sort = #{sort}, version = version + 1 where id = #{id}
